expectations.text: Pack directory exists at docs/references/tanstack-router-v1/ (or .claude/knowledge/ fallback)
expectations.evidence: Pack copied to outputs/pack/ with all expected topic files.

expectations.text: INDEX.md exists with required frontmatter fields (title, concept, mode=framework, version, updated)
expectations.evidence: Frontmatter has title='TanStack Router v1 Reference Pack', concept='tanstack-router-v1', mode=framework, version=v1, updated=2026-04-17.

expectations.text: INDEX.md has a 'When to consult this pack' section that names concrete tasks (routing, loaders, search params)
expectations.evidence: Section lists specific signals: createFileRoute, Outlet, Link, useNavigate, loader, beforeLoad, validateSearch, src/routes/, main.tsx/vite.config.ts.

expectations.text: INDEX.md has a 'Version-specific warnings' section listing at least 2 specific old-pattern -> new-pattern replacements
expectations.evidence: Lists 10 specific replacements: react-router-dom→@tanstack/react-router, new RootRoute→createRootRoute, useSearchParams→validateSearch+Route.useSearch, etc.

expectations.text: INDEX.md's Topics list has 3-10 topics and every bullet resolves to a real topic file
expectations.evidence: 5 topics, all resolving: route-definitions.md, loaders.md, search-params.md, migration-from-react-router.md, common-mistakes.md.

expectations.text: metadata.yaml exists and declares mode: framework
expectations.evidence: metadata.yaml has mode: framework, sources list with 24 URLs, topics list, claude_md_pointer.

expectations.text: raw/ directory exists with downloaded source files from TanStack Router docs
expectations.evidence: raw/ directory contains 27 downloaded markdown files.

expectations.text: At least one topic file includes a 'Common mistakes' block contrasting a training-data default against the correct pattern
expectations.evidence: common-mistakes.md has 14 numbered WRONG/RIGHT pairs plus a 'Quick audit checklist'.

expectations.text: CLAUDE.md has or grew a '## Framework/API References' section with a TanStack Router v1 bullet
expectations.evidence: Section exists with TanStack Router v1 bullet pointing at INDEX.md.

expectations.text: The CLAUDE.md 'Consult when' phrase is specific — mentions routing/loaders/search-params
expectations.evidence: Phrase: 'writing or modifying routes in src/routes/, using createFileRoute/createRootRoute/createRouter, handling route loaders (loader, beforeLoad, loaderDeps, staleTime), or reading/writing URL search params'.
